nodes.name: Prinia
nodes.summary: Prinia（Prinia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联29种鸟类，如喜山山鹪莺、斑紋鷦鶯、Annam prinia等29种鸟类。

nodes.name: 东南亚
nodes.summary: 东南亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联160种鸟类，包括棉鳧、琵嘴鸭、勺嘴鹬等160种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 云南省
nodes.summary: 云南省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联41种鸟类，包括花脸鸭、四川雉鹑、白马鸡等41种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Burmese prinia

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Burmese prinia
nodes.summary: The Burmese prinia (Prinia cooki) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It and the Annam prinia (P. rocki) were formerly lumped with Deignan's prinia (P. polychroa) as the brown prinia. It is found in Southeast Asia, where it is distributed from central Myanmar west to the western edge of Thailand and Laos, and north to the southern Yunnan Province in China. It is monotypic and has no known subspecies. It was split from P. rocki and P. polychroa following a phylogenetic study published in 2019. References
